_meta.scope: First round (1-43) + Round 2 partial (2014-2019) / full (2018-2019, 2020-2025) from Wikipedia year pages
_meta.notes: teamId follows src/data/teams.json conventions. Pre-2025 Athletics use ATH. Cleveland Indians normalize to CLE.

outcomeScale.note: Coded from public career data through Jan 2026. Top 15 of each year 2014-2020 covered explicitly; 2021-2022 unannotated; 2023-2025 = tbd. Borderline players (~2 WAR) coded conservatively as regular.

_meta.industryFVNote: Pre-draft 20-80 FV from public boards (FanGraphs THE BOARD, Baseball America, MLB Pipeline) — best-effort reconstruction. Top 15 of each year covered; deeper picks fall back to the smooth curve + jitter in featurize.
